# System: "To find a nice restaurant for you in Cambridge city center, just to confirm, do you want the cuisine type exactly as 'international'?"

# System: "I found two moderately priced restaurants in Cambridge city center serving international cuisine: 1 The Varsity Restaurant at 35 Saint Andrews Street, which offers various international and vegetarian dishes and can cater for private parties. Would you like to book a table at any of these, or do you need more information?"

# System: "Here are some train options from Cambridge to Norwich on Wednesday arriving by 15:00: 1 Leaves at 05:36, arrives at 06:55, duration 79 minutes, price £17.60 2 Leaves at 06:36, arrives at 07:55, duration 79 minutes, price £17.60 3 Leaves at 07:36, arrives at 08:55, duration 79 minutes, price £17.60 4 Leaves at 08:36, arrives at 09:55, duration 79 minutes, price £17.60 5 Leaves at 09:36, arrives at 10:55, duration 79 minutes, price £17.60 6 Leaves at 10:36, arrives at 11:55, duration 79 minutes, price £17.60 7 Leaves at 11:36, arrives at 12:55, duration 79 minutes, price £17.60. Which train would you like to book for three people?"
